reviews.comment:
Pésima dice 24 hs y no es verdad  cierra de noche y abren cuando se le dan la gana . Son las 7:15 AM y sigue cerrado.

(Translated by Google)
It's terrible, it says 24 hours but it's not true, it closes at night and opens whenever it feels like it. It's 7:15 AM and it's still closed.

reviews.comment:
Creo que siendo la única esta en un punto clave del lugar Puerto Pirámide, pero cumple con todo lo que necesitas a la hora de viajar sea necesidades propias o del auto! La atención es muy buena, los baños impecables con buena higienización eso se destaca.
En si, recomendado si visitan este sitio.

(Translated by Google)
I think that being the only one, it's in a key location in Puerto Pirámide, but it meets all your travel needs, whether for yourself or your car! The service is very good, and the bathrooms are spotless and well-maintained, which is a highlight.
Overall, I recommend it if you visit this area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNxZ3JUbWZnEAE

reviews.comment:
El lugar es, única opción y como que el playero lo sabe, tardo un montón en atendernos y medio que no te da pelota, tuvo que salir la chica del Shop para atendernos, sino estaríamos todavía que el playero siga hablando con su cliente amigo, la del Shop una genia

(Translated by Google)
The place is the only option and it seems the beach attendant knows it, it took a long time to serve us and he kind of doesn't pay attention to us, the girl from the Shop had to come out to serve us, otherwise we would still be there, the beach attendant would continue talking to his client friend, the girl from the Shop is a genius
